briefdescription.para: Initialize the XSrio instance provided by the caller based on the given Config structure.

detaileddescription.para: Initialization and Control functions in xsrio.c.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.
is the device configuration structure containing information about a specific SRIO Device.
is the Physical address of the hardware in a Virtual Memory operating system environment.It is the Base Address in a stand alone environment.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPortStatus will check the status of the port and returns the status of the port to the user.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.

listitem.para: XSRIO_PORT_OK Port is initialized with no errors.
XSRIO_PORT_UNINITIALIZED Port is not initialized. No Serial Rapidio link is present.
XSRIO_PORT_HAS_ERRORS Port is initialized but has errors.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetPEType API will check for the Processing Element type and return the type of type of Processing Element.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.

listitem.para:
XSRIO_IS_MEMORY if the core is configured as a memory
XSRIO_IS_PROCESSOR if the core is configured as a processor
XSRIO_IS_BRIDGE if the core is configured as a bridge.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_IsOperationSupported tells whether the operation is supported by the SRIO Gen2 core or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
type is the operation type of the SRIO Packet

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS if the operation is supported by the core.
XST_FAILURE if the operation is not supported by the core.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSrio *InstancePtr, u8 WaterMark0, u8 WaterMark1, u8 WaterMark2)
memberdef.name: XSrio_SetWaterMark

briefdescription.para: XSrio_SetWaterMark Configures the watermark to transfer a priority packet.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SRIO Gen2 instance to be worked on.
is the water mark value to transfer a priority 0 packet.
is the water mark value to transfer a priority 1 packet.
is the water mark value to transfer a priority 2 packet.

briefdescription.para: XSrio_GetWaterMark API reads the water mark values.

parameterdescription.para: is the XSrio instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the water mark 0 value.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the water mark 1 value.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the water mark 2 value.
